---
title: "Courses"
---

# Engineering Design

### [ENGG 1100 - Engineering and Design I](eng1100.qmd)

### [ENGG 1410 - Intro to Programming for Engineers](eng1410.qmd)


# First Principles Sciences

### [PHYSICS 1130 - Physics with Applications](phys1130.qmd)

### [MATH 1200 - Calculus I](math1200.qmd)

# Chemistry


### [CHEM 1040 - General Chemistry I](chem1040.qmd)
